summary: Younger users of dating apps want “lower pressure” and “more authentic ways of connecting,” and Tinder’s new products aimed at meeting those needs appear to be aiding Match Group’s turnaround, CFO Steve Bailey says. Bailey joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s Nicole D’Souza on this episode of the Tech Disruptors podcast to discuss how dating-app behavior is changing after the pandemic, why Gen Z women are central to Tinder’s strategy, and how AI, product updates and helping users connect in real life

title: Talking Transports: Triumph Sees Structural Freight Tightening
title_cn: 谈论运输：凯旋看到结构性货运收紧
summary: Freight markets are tightening in ways not seen since deregulation, driven more by shrinking capacity than surging demand. In this Talking Transports podcast, Triumph Financial founder & CEO Aaron Graft joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s senior transportation and logistics analyst Lee Klaskow and Bloomberg Intelligence midcap banks analyst Eric Bedell to discuss how regulatory enforcement, rising insurance costs, and increased scrutiny of carrier compliance are reshaping trucking economics. title: Altman-Backed Oklo Rises on US Nuclear Reactor Fuel Program
title_cn: 奥特曼支持的奥克洛因美国核反应堆燃料计划而上涨
summary: Oklo Inc. shares jumped after the the Sam Altman-backed reactor technology company said it’s in talks to participate in a US Department of Energy program to supply nuclear fuel, an effort aimed at relieving potential bottlenecks that threaten to slow the deployment of fission power.

title: Brands Hope for Big Payoff From World Cup Spending
title_cn: 品牌希望从世界杯支出中获得丰厚回报
summary: Global spending on the World Cup could top $80 billion. But even though it starts in a few weeks, many hotels in US host cities still have rooms available and games are not sold out because ticket prices are so high. But brands such as Adidas and Nike are still spending millions on partnerships. Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Retail Staples Analyst Jennifer Bartashus talks about it all on Bloomberg Radio. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Activist investor Ancora Holdings Group is pushing US adhesives maker H.B. Fuller Co. to abandon a proposed takeover of UK-based Advanced Medical Solutions Group Plc.

title: Stocks Rise Toward Record as Iran Peace Hopes Hold: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着伊朗和平希望的实现，股市上涨至创纪录水平：市场结束
summary: Wall Street kicked off the holiday-shortened week with stocks joining bonds higher as hopes for a peace deal between the US and Iran overshadowed military strikes in the Persian Gulf.

title: Emerging Currencies Slide as Iran War ‘Confusion’ Jolts Market
title_cn: 伊朗战争“混乱”震撼市场，新兴货币下滑
summary: Most emerging-market currencies weakened on Tuesday as overnight clashes near the Strait of Hormuz offset signs of progress toward a US-Iran peace deal, even as developing-nation stocks rose on optimism around artificial intelligence.

title: Lilly to Buy Three Vaccine Developers for Up to $3.8 Billion
title_cn: 礼来公司将以高达 38 亿美元的价格收购三家疫苗开发商
summary:
Eli Lilly & Co. is buying three clinical-stage vaccine developers for as much as $3.8 billion, leveraging its obesity-fueled dominance to establish itself as a leader in other areas and become a major player in infectious diseases. 
The agreements with Curevo, LimmaTech Biologics and Vaccine Company give Lilly access to novel technology and experimental immunizations for shingles, common bacterial pathogens and Epstein-Barr virus, according to a statement on Tuesday. 
“These acquisitions reflect a deliberate strategy to prevent disease at its source rather than treat its consequences,” Dan Skovronsky, Lilly’s chief scientific and product officer, said in a statement. 

Bloomberg News Health Reporter, Madison Muller, joins Paul Sweeney and Alexis Christoforous on "Bloomberg Intelligence" to analyze what's next for Eli Lilly after agreeing to buy three vaccine developers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel Seeks Deal That Eliminates Nuclear Danger From Iran
title_cn: 以色列寻求消除伊朗核威胁的协议
summary: Dan Williams, Bloomberg News Middle East Reporter, discusses the latest developments in the ongoing conflict involving the US, Iran, and Israel. He says Israeli's want to see a "conclusive" deal reached with Iran and one that would address the threats from Hezbollah. He reports from Jerusalem. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trader Hunt for AI Winners Leads to Seasoning Maker in Japan
title_cn: 交易员寻找人工智能获胜者导致日本调味品制造商
summary: The beneficiaries of the artificial intelligence buildout are spreading far beyond technology high-flyers. Laura Lau found one in seasoning maker Ajinomoto Co.

title: Stocks Pare Gains as Waning Confidence Offsets Iran Optimism
title_cn: 由于信心减弱抵消了伊朗的乐观情绪，股市收窄涨幅
summary: Equities pared gains as investors weighed slipping US consumer confidence against signals that a deal to re-open the Strait of Hormuz may be near, even as hostilities flared to test the fragile Iran war ceasefire.

title: What It Takes to Run One of London's Most Popular Pubs | Odd Lots
title_cn: 经营伦敦最受欢迎的酒吧之一需要什么？零股
summary: Restaurants are great microcosms for macro-economic trends. They sit at the intersection of everything from consumer confidence to commodity costs to the labor market. According to the British Beer and Pub Association, approximately two pubs a day have closed in England during the first quarter of 2026. Could pubs tell us something about larger trends in the British economy? We talk to Oisin Rogers and Ashley Palmer-Watts, co-founders of The Devonshire, a famed London pub, to find out. Rogers, the publican, discusses the difference between a good and bad pub, why he hates the word 'gastropub,' and how the indoor smoking ban changed the meaning of pubs for the average Londoner. In a segment from our London live show, chef Palmer-Watts details the factors that lead to a perfect pint of Guinness, why higher ingredient costs does not always correlate to higher menu prices, and about making a Victorian-era meat fruit for Apple's Jony Ive. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Webster Investors Approve $12 Billion Purchase by Santander
title_cn: 韦伯斯特投资者批准桑坦德银行 120 亿美元收购
summary: Webster Financial Corp.’s shareholders accepted the $12 billion takeover proposal from Banco Santander SA, clearing one of the last remaining hurdles for the deal.

title: KNDS on Track For Initial Public Offering as Sales Surge
title_cn: 随着销售激增，KNDS 有望首次公开募股
summary: KNDS NV said it’s pushing ahead with plans to go public as the Franco-German tank maker seeks to capitalize on surging demand that drove earnings and sales last year.

title: European Stocks End Six-Day Winning Run; BP Falls as Chair Fired
title_cn: 欧洲股市结束六天上涨走势； BP 因主席被解雇而倒台
summary: A six-day rally in European stocks stalled on Tuesday, as Brent crude rebounded on reports of fresh clashes between Iranian and US forces in the Hormuz Strait.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/26/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 26 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Rises as US-Iran Clashes Muddy Outlook for Peace Deal
title_cn: 美伊冲突和平协议前景黯淡，油价上涨
summary: Oil rebounded as fresh clashes between the US and Iran clouded the outlook for an interim deal to reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: Gold Declines as Gulf Strikes Cloud Interest Rate Outlook
title_cn: 海湾袭击令利率前景蒙上阴影，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell as military strikes in the Persian Gulf dimmed hopes for a US-Iran peace deal and reinforced concerns that persistent inflation could keep interest rates higher for longer.

title: Lilly’s One-Time Cholesterol Shot
title_cn: 礼来公司的一次性胆固醇注射液
summary: Eli Lilly is developing a groundbreaking one-time gene-editing treatment that could permanently lower bad cholesterol and reduce heart disease risk. Bloomberg's Madison Muller joins Open Interest to break down the science, the risks, and why Lilly is racing to expand beyond obesity drugs into its next major growth era. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Bonds Gain in Catch-Up Trade as Trump Sees Iran Progress
title_cn: 特朗普看到伊朗取得进展，美国债券在追赶贸易中上涨
summary: Treasuries rose as investors reacted to oil price declines after US President Donald Trump said peace negotiations with Iran were proceeding, even as tensions in the Middle East remain high.

title: US Consumer Confidence Slips Amid Widespread Price Worries
title_cn: 由于普遍的价格担忧，美国消费者信心下滑
summary: US consumer confidence edged down in May as views of current economic conditions settled back amid rising prices due to the war in Iran.

title: Lilly Gets Back Into the Vaccine Business With New Deals
title_cn: 礼来公司通过新交易重返疫苗业务
summary: Eli Lilly & Co. is buying three clinical-stage vaccine developers for as much as $3.8 billion as it looks to become a leader in infectious diseases. The drugmaker has been using cash from its obesity drugs to expand into other disease areas. Bloomberg's Gerry Smith reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AutoZone & Ferrari Slide; Eli Lilly Announces Acquisitions | Stock Movers
title_cn: AutoZone 和法拉利滑道；礼来公司 (Eli Lilly) 宣布收购库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers:

- AutoZone (AZO) shares fall after the retailer of automotive replacement parts posted comparable sales for the third quarter that fell short of Wall Street’s expectations.

- Ferrari (RACE IM) shares fell almost 8% after critics panned the look of its first fully electric vehicle, a setback for the Italian super-car maker’s controversial push into EVs.

- Eli Lilly (LLY) agreed to buy three vaccine developers for as much as $3.8 billion, marking the drugmaker’s re-entry into the infectious disease space. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Roadshow Begins After Starship Launch
title_cn: 星际飞船发射后 SpaceX 路演开始
summary: Space and satellite stocks are surging as SpaceX begins its IPO roadshow. Elon Musk's company filed last week for what stands to be the biggest initial public offering ever. On Friday, the company's Starship launched and successfully deployed mock satellites before returning to Earth safely. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary Edges Toward June Interest Rate Cut After Forint Rally
title_cn: 福林上涨后匈牙利六月即将降息
summary: Hungary’s central bank is edging toward cutting the second-highest key interest rate level in the European Union following an improvement in the outlook for inflation and local markets.

title: Insurance Firm Safepoint, Backers Seek $283.3 Million in IPO
title_cn: 保险公司 Safepoint 及其支持者寻求 2.833 亿美元的 IPO
summary: Safepoint Holdings Inc., an underwriter of specialty homeowners and commercial insurance, and some of its backers are seeking to raise as much as $283.3 million in an US initial public offering.

title: Warner Boosts Loan Sale Again, Plans to Repay $15 Billion Bridge
title_cn: 华纳再次加大贷款销售力度，计划偿还 150 亿美元过桥费
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. boosted a loan sale for a second time, a move that will allow the media giant to fully replace $15 billion of short-term financing.

title: Revel to Merge With EQT-Backed Voltera, Uniting EV Charging Networks
title_cn: Revel 将与 EQT 支持的 Voltera 合并，联合电动汽车充电网络
summary: Private equity-backed Voltera and Revel Transit Inc. have agreed to merge their electric-vehicle charging businesses to serve ride-hail cars and robotaxis across urban areas in the US.

title: The Cost of Teaching Wall Street Bankers to Use AI Tools
title_cn: 教华尔街银行家使用人工智能工具的成本
summary:
As Wall Street is getting caught up in AI angst and looking to hire more AI specialists and shrink traditional banking roles, two highly sought-after AI trainers in finance are charging $25,000 for a day of training. Bloomberg's Sally Bakewell joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow for more on "Bloomberg Tech."

Original filename: 20260526_172128_Wall_Street_Banks_Invest_Heavily_in_AI_Training_to_Stay_Comp.mp4 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple, Google Blast Canada’s Plan to Expand Police Data Powers
title_cn: 苹果和谷歌抨击加拿大扩大警察数据权力的计划
summary: A proposed law in Canada allowing police more access to citizens’ data faces a growing chorus of criticism from technology companies, including threats that they’ll pull out of the country.

title: Qualcomm to Supply Chips to TikTok Owner ByteDance
title_cn: 高通将向 TikTok 所有者字节跳动供应芯片
summary: Qualcomm will supply chips to TikTok owner ByteDance for artificial intelligence data centers, according to people familiar with the matter. Ian King helped break the story and he reports on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Shares Rally, UBS Projects $1.8 Trillion Market Value
title_cn: 美光股价上涨，瑞银预计市值达 1.8 万亿美元
summary: Micron Technology Inc.’s market capitalization, which has soared about 700% over the past year, will more than double over the next 12 months, according to at least one analyst.

title: AI’s Massive Power Problem
title_cn: 人工智能的巨大能耗问题
summary: The AI data center boom is becoming an industrial arms race. CyrusOne CEO Eric Schwartz joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the future of AI depends on power grids, skilled labor, and trillion-dollar infrastructure bets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Debt Reshapes Wall Street
title_cn: 人工智能债务重塑华尔街
summary: Wall Street’s AI boom is spilling into credit markets. As hyperscalers' issue huge amounts of debt, banks are buying protection to manage exposure, while hedge funds sell that protection for what looks like easy money. But if the AI race starts producing winners and losers, this quiet CDS trade could become much riskier. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: American Airlines to Equip 500 Jets With SpaceX Starlink Wi-Fi Starting 2027
title_cn: 美国航空将从 2027 年开始为 500 架喷气式飞机配备 SpaceX Starlink Wi-Fi
summary: American Airlines Group Inc. plans to install SpaceX’s Starlink satellite internet service across more than 500 narrowbody aircraft beginning in early 2027, deepening an industrywide race among carriers to offer faster and more reliable onboard connectivity as they compete for premium travelers.

title: Ferrari EV Gets Brutal Reviews
title_cn: 法拉利电动车受到残酷评论
summary: Ferrari’s first fully electric car is already dividing fans. Critics say the $640K EV looks more like a Nissan Leaf or "a bar of soap" than a Ferrari,  but the company may not care. Bloomberg's Craig Trudell joins Open Interest to explain why Ferrari only needs a handful of wealthy buyers to make the Luce a success, and how the brand could use the EV to unlock access to future supercars.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qualcomm Strikes AI Chip Deal With TikTok Owner ByteDance
title_cn: 高通与 TikTok 所有者字节跳动达成人工智能芯片协议
summary: Qualcomm Inc. reached a deal with TikTok owner ByteDance Ltd. to supply chips for artificial intelligence data centers, according to people familiar with the matter, marking a key win for a company trying to expand from smartphone processors into AI infrastructure.

title: Pony AI Lifts 2026 Robotaxi Fleet Goal on Faster Growth
title_cn: 小马AI提升2026年Robotaxi车队目标，实现更快增长
summary: Pony AI Inc. raised its robotaxi fleet target for this year by 500 vehicles to 3,500 after reporting stronger-than-expected first-quarter revenue.

title: Musk’s xAI Warns Staffers to Limit Contact With Cursor Employees
title_cn: 马斯克的 xAI 警告员工限制与 Cursor 员工的接触
summary: Employees at Elon Musk’s xAI were warned by the company’s top lawyer to carefully moderate their interactions with workers from Cursor — a directive that came weeks after Musk’s firm announced a possible deal to acquire the AI coding startup.

title: UBS Raises Micron to Street-High Target
title_cn: 瑞银将美光科技提高至最高目标
summary: UBS raised its price target on Micron to a Street-high view of $1,625, up from $535. Mandeep Singh has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xiaomi Profit Drops More Than Expected in Memory Chip Crunch
title_cn: 内存芯片紧缺，小米利润降幅超预期
summary: Xiaomi Corp.’s quarterly profit tanked more than anticipated after sharp increases in memory prices exacted a heavy toll on the Chinese firm’s smartphone business.

title: Google’s Fitbit Air Gives Whoop Some Serious Competition
title_cn: 谷歌的 Fitbit Air 给 Whoop 带来了激烈的竞争
summary: The Fitbit Air, a new $100 screenless wearable from Alphabet Inc.’s Google, represents a major evolution in what consumers can expect from fitness trackers as tech companies race into an era of personalized health and artificial intelligence-powered wellness insights.

title: Patrick Drahi Swiss Assets Seized in Spat With Altice Co-Founder
title_cn: Patrick Drahi 与 Altice 联合创始人发生口角，瑞士资产被扣押
summary: Patrick Drahi’s spat with Altice co-founder Armando Pereira has escalated after Swiss courts ordered the seizure of assets following a lawsuit by the latter to reclaim at least 1.2 billion francs ($1.5 billion) he claims he’s owed.

title: AP CEO Defends Swatch Collaboration
title_cn: AP 首席执行官捍卫 Swatch 合作
summary: Audemars Piguet's recent collaboration with Swatch led to scuffles outside stores from New York to Paris to Milan, as crowds queued for hours to get their hands on the Royal Pop pocket watch collection. Despite criticism that the collaboration could 'cheapen' the brand, CEO Ilaria Resta says it has made AP more accessible to a younger audience, while the thing she fears most is 'irrelevance'. She spoke on 'The Pulse with Francine Lacqua' on Bloomberg TV.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: There Aren’t Enough GPUs on Earth — Let Alone for Space
title_cn: 地球上没有足够的 GPU –更不用说空间了
summary: SpaceX’s IPO filing warns that current AI chip supply may be insufficient for its long-term orbital compute ambitions

title: Insilico Taps US Partner to Build AI Model for Human Longevity
title_cn: Insilico 与美国合作伙伴构建人类长寿人工智能模型
summary: Hong Kong AI drug discovery firm Insilico Medicine Cayman TopCo is stepping up the quest to harness artificial intelligence to extend human life.

title: Logistics Firm Stord Nabs $250 Million to Help Brands Take On Amazon
title_cn: 物流公司 Stord 融资 2.5 亿美元帮助品牌挑战亚马逊
summary: Stord Inc., a logistics technology startup, raised $250 million in a new funding round to expand its fulfillment operation and help merchants better compete with Amazon.com Inc.

title: Kenya in Talks With Karpowership for Emergency Power Supply
title_cn: 肯尼亚与 Karpowership 就应急电力供应进行谈判
summary: Kenya plans to contract Karpowership, the world’s biggest provider of ship-mounted electricity plants, to provide emergency power for the nation’s growing demands.

title: Audemars Piguet CEO Resta Says Swatch Tie-up Smashed Web Records
title_cn: 爱彼首席执行官雷斯塔表示，与斯沃琪的合作打破了网络记录
summary: For Audemars Piguet Chief Executive Officer Ilaria Resta, the response to the luxury Swiss timepiece maker’s launch of a pocket watch in collaboration with Swatch has been overwhelming.

title: Nokia’s 140% Rally Turns AI Comeback Into Valuation Puzzle
title_cn: 诺基亚 140% 的涨幅让 AI 卷土重来陷入估值难题
summary: A rally in Nokia Oyj is forcing investors to reconsider the company not as an old telecom-equipment stock, but as part of the infrastructure underpinning the artificial intelligence boom.

title: BNP Paribas Works With Mistral to Prep for Mythos-Like AI Models
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行与 Mistral 合作，为神话般的人工智能模型做准备
summary: BNP Paribas SA is working with French artificial intelligence startup Mistral AI and other partners to prepare for cybersecurity threats posed by new models such as Anthropic PBC’s Mythos.

title: Pope Leo Calls on World Leaders, Tech Titans to Disarm
title_cn: 教皇利奥呼吁世界领导人和科技巨头解除武装
summary: Every detail was designed for maximum impact.

title: AI Trainers Get $25,000 a Day to Automate Wall Street Workflows
title_cn: AI 培训师每天可赚取 25,000 美元，以实现华尔街工作流程自动化
summary: Wall Street firms are paying two highly sought-after trainers in finance $25,000 a day to tell bankers what’s missing from their AI plans. Matthew Bloxham of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Expands Travel Curbs to Top AI Talent at Private Firms
title_cn: 中国扩大对私营企业顶尖人工智能人才的旅行限制
summary: China is restricting overseas travel for top AI professionals in private firms such as Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and DeepSeek, suggesting an escalation in measures intended to safeguard its technology and catch up to the US in a pivotal sphere.

title: ING’s ‘Vibe Coding’ AI Is Building Its New Trading Systems
title_cn: ING 的“Vibe Coding”人工智能正在构建新的交易系统
summary: ING Groep NV is turning to “vibe coding” to build electronic trading tools for currencies and credit, its latest use of artificial intelligence to compete with larger peers.

title: Trump Administration Demands Federal Worker NDAs in New Crackdown on Leaks
title_cn: 特朗普政府要求联邦工作人员签署保密协议以打击泄密行为
summary: The Trump administration is moving to create a government-wide nondisclosure agreement for federal workers after a number of high-profile and unauthorized leaks in recent months.

title: US Touts Iran Deal Prospects Amid Fresh Tensions in Hormuz
title_cn: 在霍尔木兹新的紧张局势中，美国吹捧伊朗协议前景
summary: The US is touting progress toward a peace deal with Iran to end the nearly three-month war, even amid fresh hostilities and uncertainty over the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: Germany, Canada to Sign Major LNG Deal as Europe Seeks Energy Security
title_cn: 欧洲寻求能源安全，德国和加拿大将签署重大液化天然气协议
summary: Canada is set to announce a deal to supply Germany with liquefied natural gas from a planned export facility on the coast of British Columbia, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Exxon, ConocoPhillips Seek Safeguards to Return to Venezuela
title_cn: 埃克森美孚和康菲石油公司寻求保障措施返回委内瑞拉
summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. and ConocoPhillips are pushing for durable contract terms and a way to resolve billions of dollars owed to them as they consider re-entering Venezuela after exiting the country two decades ago.

title: Trump Says Medical Exam Went Well But Provides No Details
title_cn: 特朗普表示体检进展顺利，但没有提供细节
summary: President Donald Trump said his physical at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center went “PERFECTLY,” but provided no details on the results of his examination.

title: Nasty Texas Republican Runoff Comes to a Head Today
title_cn: 令人讨厌的德克萨斯州共和党决选今天达到顶峰
summary: The intense Republican primary runoff election for a US Senate seat from Texas comes to an end today. The showdown between incumbent John Cornyn and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has become one the most expensive in Senate history. Joe Lovinger reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Scotland Renews Push for Independence With Labour in Turmoil
title_cn: 苏格兰在工党动荡中重新推动独立
summary: Scotland’s devolved parliament voted to demand the UK government hand over the power to hold a fresh independence referendum as First Minister John Swinney seeks to build on a recent election win and take advantage of political turmoil in London.

title: Crypto Firm HTX Accused By UK Of Helping Russia Move Money
title_cn: 英国指控加密货币公司 HTX 帮助俄罗斯转移资金
summary: Cryptocurrency firm HTX has been sanctioned by the UK government, who allege that the exchange was part of “infrastructure” used by Russia to circumvent sanctions and helped move $1.5 billion back to the Kremlin.

title: Rubio Seeks to Repair US-India Relations After Trump-Era Strains
title_cn: 卢比奥寻求在特朗普时代紧张后修复美印关系
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio’s four-day visit to India featured warm handshakes and promises of deeper cooperation. There was even a surprise call by President Donald Trump to a US embassy-sponsored bash in New Delhi, where he told guests how much he loved the country.

title: Israeli Troops Push Further Into Lebanon in War With Hezbollah
title_cn: 以色列军队在与真主党的战争中进一步深入黎巴嫩
summary: Israel’s military said its ground forces are moving further into Lebanon, in what could signal an expanded presence in the south of the country as part of the ongoing war with Iran-backed Hezbollah.

title: James Stavridis: Chokepoint Economy Starts With Hormuz
title_cn: 詹姆斯·斯塔夫里迪斯：阻塞点经济从霍尔木兹开始
summary:
US and Iranian forces clashed near the Strait of Hormuz overnight, highlighting the tension between the two sides even as they tout progress toward an interim peace deal.

The exchange of strikes came hours after US President Donald Trump said negotiations with Tehran to extend their ceasefire and reopen the strait are proceeding, though Secretary of State Marco Rubio added Tuesday that a deal would likely take a few days to finalize.

For more on the state of the conflict, we speak with Ret. Adm. James Stavridis, Bloomberg Opinion contributor and former Supreme Allied Commander of NATO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil Police Raid Ex-Rio Governor’s Home in Banco Master Probe
title_cn: 巴西警方突袭前里约州长家中银行主调查
summary: Brazil’s federal police carried out search-and-seizure warrants against former Rio de Janeiro Governor Cláudio Castro as part of a new phase of the investigation into failed lender Banco Master SA.

title: The Key Sticking Points for a US-Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 美伊和平协议的关键症结
summary: The US and Iran have been locked in a stalemate since agreeing to a ceasefire in April. They’ve been unable to reach a deal to end a monthslong war that has killed thousands of people and sparked a global energy crunch.

title: EU Seeks to Fix Baltic Defense Gaps After Drone Incursions
title_cn: 无人机入侵后欧盟寻求修复波罗的海防御缺口
summary: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen called for unified alert systems and improved cross-border coordination after a string of Ukrainian drone incursions into Baltic airspace exposed gaps in Europe’s defenses.

title: Putin Steps Up Kyiv Missile Strikes Seeking Momentum in War
title_cn: 普京加大基辅导弹袭击力度，寻求战争动力
summary: With the battlefield largely at a stalemate, Russia is ramping up ballistic missile attacks on Ukraine to try to regain the strategic initiative by overwhelming air defenses and demoralizing its population.

title: Bolivia Unrest Threatens Return of Chaos, Sinks Sovereign Bonds
title_cn: 玻利维亚骚乱威胁重新陷入混乱，主权债券陷入困境
summary: Bolivian sovereign bonds are in free-fall, dropping for a 10th day on Tuesday as protests and road blockades choke off essential supplies to La Paz and lead to violent clashes, threatening to push South America’s poorest country back into political and economic chaos.

title: Iran Restores Partial Internet Access After Months of Blackout
title_cn: 伊朗在停电数月后恢复部分互联网接入
summary: Iran started restoring access to the internet — a sign that the longest shutdown of its kind in history is easing amid a diplomatic push to end the war with the US.

title: Texas Voters Get Last Say After Trump Backs Paxton in Runoff
title_cn: 特朗普在决选中支持帕克斯顿后，德克萨斯州选民获得最后发言权
summary: Republican voters in Texas get their final say Tuesday in a drawn out, vitriolic and expensive primary campaign for a US Senate seat, a race that Democrats are watching closely in hopes that they could flip both houses of Congress in November.

title: Chile’s New Government Cries Foul Over Past Debt Projections
title_cn: 智利新政府对过去的债务预测表示不满
summary: Chile’s new government said it’s facing a steeper fiscal challenge than even it had anticipated, claiming the previous administration of President Gabriel Boric had overestimated revenue and turned a blind eye to some expenses.

title: US and Iran Clash Near Hormuz as Talks Go ‘Back and Forth’
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡附近发生冲突，谈判“来回”
summary: US and Iranian forces clashed near the Strait of Hormuz overnight, highlighting the tension between the two sides even as they tout progress toward an interim peace deal.

title: Senegal Dollar Bonds Slump as Political Standoff Deepens
title_cn: 随着政治僵局加深，塞内加尔美元债券暴跌
summary: Senegal’s dollar bonds fell sharply as investors digested days of political turmoil after the West African nation’s prime minister was fired and then swiftly returned to a position of power that could undermine President Bassirou Diomaye Faye.

title: Dutch Block US Takeover of Cloud Services Provider Solvinity
title_cn: 荷兰阻止美国收购云服务提供商 Solvinity
summary: The Dutch government blocked a proposed takeover of Solvinity Group BV, a provider of cloud services in the Netherlands, by US-based Kyndryl, citing security concerns.

title: Kremlin Names Top Business Lobby Chief as Putin’s New Ombudsman
title_cn: 克里姆林宫任命高级商业游说首长为普京的新监察员
summary: The Kremlin said Alexander Shokhin, head of the lobby group representing major industries in Russia, will become President Vladimir Putin’s new business ombudsman.

title: Rubio Unveils Indo-Pacific Monitor Plan as Hormuz Crisis Deepens
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹危机加深，卢比奥公布印度太平洋监测计划
summary: The US, Japan, India and Australia launched a maritime surveillance initiative for the Indo-Pacific region as the Hormuz crisis deepens. Debjit Chakraborty explains how the high-profile summit aims to counter growing threats to commerce. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spanish Probe Into Ex-Leader Is Hurting Sánchez’s Government
title_cn: 西班牙对前领导人的调查正在伤害桑切斯政府
summary: When Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez overturned a significant polling deficit to hold on to power in 2023, his Socialist predecessor José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero was a crucial ally on the campaign trail. Three years later, Zapatero’s legal troubles are threatening the Socialist leader’s bid for reelection next year.

title: Fresh Clashes Highlight US-Iran Tensions Despite Talks Progress
title_cn: 尽管谈判取得进展，但新的冲突凸显了美伊紧张局势
summary: US and Iranian forces clashed near the Strait of Hormuz overnight, even as they tout progress toward an interim peace deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubio Unveils Indo-Pacific Monitor Plan as Hormuz Crisis Deepens
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹危机加深，卢比奥公布印度太平洋监测计划
summary: The US, Japan, India and Australia on Tuesday launched a maritime surveillance initiative for the Indo-Pacific region, among other measures, as the countries’ foreign ministers gathered in New Delhi for a high-profile summit aimed at countering growing threats to commerce.

title: Texas Senate Showdown Latest Test of Trump’s Sway
title_cn: 德克萨斯州参议院摊牌对特朗普影响力的最新考验
summary: The runoff pits a longstanding GOP senator against a Trump-backed ‘fighter’

title: Italy’s Meloni Says EU Bureaucrats Stifle Economic Growth
title_cn: 意大利总理梅洛尼称欧盟官僚扼杀经济增长
summary: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni accused the European Union of restricting the bloc’s ability to grow and be competitive on the world stage.
